About

Design as a language
of feeling.

I'm Heyanshe — a Creative Design student at Srishti Manipal Institute, specialising in Business Services and System Design with minors in Visual Communication and Human-Centered Design.

I work at the intersection of digital illustration, visual design, and user-centered thinking. Currently seeking internships to grow and collaborate.
